response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video content. 2. Identified multiple distinct scenes based on location changes and on-screen text transitions (kitchen, carriage, title card, campfire). 3. Evaluated the audio content of each scene; confirmed all audio consists of character dialogue and sound effects, with no vocal songs present. 4. Set 'contains_vocal_music' to false for all scenes and set song-related fields to null as required.
response.global_summary: A comedic skit video featuring various virtual characters engaging in dialogue. The video is structured in chapters with transitions and a title card for a recurring series called 'Half a Fortnite Away from Death'. There is no vocal musical performance in this video.

scenes.description: Characters are gathered in a kitchen, arguing about Thanksgiving and cooking.
Transition screen displaying the 'T.A.N. The Autofister Network' logo with static visual effects.
Two characters sit in a carriage, discussing curse words and their YouTube channel's potential demonetization.
Title card appears for 'PREVIOUSLY ON: HALF A FORTNITE AWAY FROM DEATH', introducing a recap.
Two characters sit around a campfire in a forest, discussing deep topics and interacting with a dancing skeleton.
